title: rosa × andegavensis rotundifolia
intro: Rosa × andegavensis rotundifolia, also known as the Andegavian rose or round-leaf rose, is a rare and endangered species of rose plant that is native to the French Alps. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Rosa × andegavensis rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
